top_signals.title: Dollar Jumps to Highest Since November on Fed Rate Hike Bets - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Dollar Jumps to Highest Since November on Fed Rate Hike Bets  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: We Can't Use The Strategic Petroleum Reserve For Political Purposes Says Mike Sommers
top_signals.summary: Mike Sommers, president of the American Petroleum Institute, joined Balance of Power to discuss the American Energy Security Framework. Sommers said the nation's Strategic Petroleum Reserve is "in desperate need of upgrading." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s New Credit Funds Win SEC Nod for Monthly Redemptions
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. won approval to offer monthly redemptions on a new interval fund investing in private and public credit, as the direct-lending industry grapples with another round of elevated requests to pull out cash.
